texto: I want a History of Looking. For the Photograph is the advent of myself as other: a cunning dissociation of consciousness from identity. Even odder: it was before Photography that men had the most to say about the vision of the double. Heautoscopy was compared with an hallucinosis
autor: for centuries this was a great mythic theme.
explicacao: Citação de for centuries this was a great mythic theme. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I want a History of Looking. For the Photograph is the advent of myself as other: a cunning disso…” articula reflexao, roland-barthes, history em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
